form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes off a 36 day let-up. At the latest run got back early 4th of 7 at Fairgrounds Turf on March 6 over 1710m, 6 len behind Mischief Ride with 55.5kg at $12.50. Before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Fairgrounds Turf on February 12 over 1609m, 1.5 len behind Ramblin with 55.5kg at $29.80. Capable of a better run.

form.formComment: Returns from a 56-day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 12 at Turfway Park on February 14 over 1609m, 35 len behind Mendels Mate carrying 54.5kg at $12.42. The start before that got back early 9th of 12 at Turfway Park on January 3 over 1609m, 11 len behind Kilo Tango with 54.5kg at $16.99. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fourth of 10 at Saratoga Inner Turf August 31 over 1710m, 1.1 len behind Sunrise with 54kg at $4.35. On debut third in a small field at Saratoga July 27 over 1408m, 8 len behind Tapit's Legacy with 54kg at $5.20. Solid top-three proposition.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign fifth of 14 at Del Mar Turf in the G1 Breeders Cup Juvenile Turf October 31 over 1609m, 5.5 len behind Gstaad carrying 55.5kg at $28.80. On debut fifth of 7 at Saratoga July 13 over 1106m, 5.5 len behind Malus with 54kg at $5.40. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 51-day let-up. First-up after three months 7th of 11 at Turfway Park on February 19 over 1207m, 12 len behind Stackin Sats with 54.5kg at $5.67. Previously second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 11 at Kentucky on September 7 over 1308m, 6 len behind Vintur carrying 54kg at $12.54. Must improve significantly.

form.formComment: At debut, 4th of 12 at Gulfstream Park Turf on February 8 over 1609m, 1.3 len behind Beautiful War with 55.5kg at $20.90. Can improve and should give a good account.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). At debut, 4th of 12 at Gulfstream Park Turf on February 8 over 1609m, 1.3 len behind Beautiful War with 55.5kg at $20.90. Can improve and should give a good account.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 54-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Fairgrounds Turf on February 16 over 1106m, 2 len behind Chasing Freedom with 54.5kg at $2.70. The run before that 4th of 9 at Fairgrounds Turf on January 19 over 1106m, 2 len behind Magic Brew with 54.5kg at $6.50. Hard to make much of a case.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, 3rd of 11 at Turfway Park on March 21 over 1207m, 4 len behind Volendam with 54.5kg at $39.57. Not likely to find this quite as easy as the debut outing.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up second last in a small field at Santa Anita on January 23 over 1308m, 11 len behind Liam Smith with 55.5kg at $9. Second run from a spell 3rd in a small field at Santa Anita on March 22 over 1408m, 5 len behind Cruisin For Cali with 55.5kg at $3.90. This is well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At very big odds at debut, second last of 9 at Oaklawn Park on December 27 over 1609m, 16 len behind Six String Prince with 54.5kg at $57. Last start 3rd of 9 at Turfway Park on February 27 over 1609m, 5 len behind Hayes Goal carrying 54.5kg at $24.33. Not doing enough to threaten the top few today.

form.formComment: First-starter by Kingman out of Rubinette. Market will go a long way to showcasing his chances.
